rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §37.0181, which governs professional development training for school administrators on student discipline procedures.
quote: Each principal or other appropriate administrator who oversees student discipline shall, at least once every three school years, attend professional development training regarding this subchapter
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax exemption change and this education discipline training statute.
